scenes.title: The Meadow
scenes.background_prompt: A wide green meadow with a wooden post-and-rail fence, wildflowers, rolling hills in the background, and a bright blue sky with white clouds. No animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A wide green meadow on a bright day. A white horse with a flowing silver mane gallops powerfully across the meadow from left to right, its legs extended in full stride, muscles rippling under its smooth coat, tail streaming behind. A small brown foal with spindly legs stands near the wooden post-and-rail fence to the right, watching the galloping horse with its ears perked forward. Wildflowers in purple and white dot the grass. Rolling green hills extend into the background under a bright blue sky with a few puffy white clouds. The wooden fence runs along the edge of the meadow, its posts casting short shadows in the midday sun.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place horse galloping powerfully across the meadow from left to right, legs extended in full stride, mane flowing, tail streaming. Place foal near the wooden fence (right), standing with ears perked forward, watching.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, tall blades of green grass surround a cluster of orange and yellow cup-shaped flowers on thin green stems. Moving right along the bottom edge, there are patches of green clovers and scattered small blue five-petaled flowers with yellow centers. In the bottom right corner, another cluster of yellow and orange flowers sits amidst tall grass. In the midground on the left, a large white horse is galloping toward the right side of the frame. The horse has a long, flowing cream-colored mane and tail, a simple black eye, and dark grey hooves. Its front left leg is extended forward while its other legs are in various stages of a running stride. It is positioned over a patch of darker green grass filled with small blue flowers. To the right of the horse, in the right third of the grassy field, stands a small brown foal. The foal is stationary, facing left toward the larger horse, and has a short dark brown mane and tail with dark grey hooves. Behind both animals, a brown wooden fence with horizontal rails and vertical posts spans the width of the scene. Beyond the fence, the landscape consists of rolling green hills and clusters of rounded green bushes. On the far left and far right sides of the background, there are groups of leafy green trees with brown trunks. The top of the scene is a bright blue sky filled with several large, fluffy white clouds. A soft yellow glow emanates from behind the central clouds, indicating a clear, sunny day.

CH: a small brown foal standing still
S: a sunny green field with flowers
rolling hills under a blue sky
a brown wooden fence in midground
IE: the white horse starts to gallop
the sun shines over the hills
IR: the horse feels energetic and free
the foal feels curious and watchful
P: the horse wants to run fast
the foal plans to follow along
A: standing still and watching the horse
CO: the horse moves across the field
the foal stays near the fence

CC: it is sunny so they play
L: the horse whinnies to the foal
